TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Makotaay == alang Makotaay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 524 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 438 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 86 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 79%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Makotaay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Makotaay hya' ga Mangcelan. tay mkyahu' na Makotaay hya' ga Tokar. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh Makotaay alang Makotaay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 146 buwan, 415 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 402 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 93%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Makotaay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Makotaay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Makotaay hya' ga Tida'an. tay mkyahu' na Makotaay hya' ga Laeno. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Makotaay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: == makotaaj == alaŋ makotaaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa maŋʦ~ʨelan. taj mkjaħuʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa tokar. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ makotaaj alaŋ makotaaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, keβalan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa ti*aʔan. taj mkjaħuʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa laeno. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ makotaaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: == Makotaay == alang Makotaay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 524 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 438 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 86 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 79%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Makotaay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Makotaay hya' ga Mangcelan. tay mkyahu' na Makotaay hya' ga Tokar. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh Makotaay alang Makotaay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 146 buwan, 415 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 402 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 93%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Makotaay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Makotaay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Makotaay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Makotaay hya' ga Tida'an. tay mkyahu' na Makotaay hya' ga Laeno. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Makotaay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: == makotaaj == alaŋ makotaaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa maŋʦ~ʨelan. taj mkjaħuʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa tokar. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ makotaaj alaŋ makotaaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, keβalan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa ti*aʔan. taj mkjaħuʔ na makotaaj ħjaʔ ɣa laeno. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ makotaaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
